---
title: "Rust API"
---

The Rust API reference is generated by `rustdoc`, separately from the Python API
pages generated by `quartodoc`.

The crate-level Rust API is published on
[docs.rs/astroapers](https://docs.rs/astroapers) after the Cargo crate release.

For local checks, run `make docs-build` and open `rustdoc/astroapers/index.html`
inside the rendered site. For Rust-only docs, run `make docs-rust` and open
`target/doc/astroapers/index.html`.
